title: State of the Feed — Week of June 15–21, 2026
content_html:
The aggregator completed 31 runs during the week of June 15–21, 2026, processing an average of 960 articles per run and filtering to an average of 35 quality articles per run. Total article volume across all categories reached 1,083 quality articles. The news category dominated with 814 articles, followed by ai-tech and wellness each contributing 78 articles. Climate, local, and science categories provided 28, 27, and 26 articles respectively, while homelab and scifi contributed 19 and 13 articles.

Five feeds reported errors during the reporting period: OpenMedia, BC Forestry Tech and Silviculture (Kagi), Precision Agriculture and AgTech (Kagi), National Indigenous Innovation (Kagi), and Kagi Summarizer. These five feeds are among the 80 total feeds currently experiencing errors. No new feeds were added to the aggregator this week, and no feed discovery report was generated.
